A '''tri-wing shuttle'''<ref name="LoE" /> was used by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] to flee [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Prisoner/Legends|captive]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].<ref name="CloneWarsEp25" />

==History==
When an [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] carrying [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] flew nearby, this [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle's]] [[IG-100 MagnaGuard/Legends|IG-100 MagnaGuard]] crew shot it down. However, Mace jumped out of [[Gender/Legends|his]] gunship before it crashed and attempted to stop the shuttle from taking off. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] took out four [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] to [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|fight]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], but he used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Telekinesis/Legends|crush]] Grievous's chest, causing his already irritated insides to be disrupted<ref name="CloneWarsEp25" /> and resulting in spasms of uncontrollable coughing that lasted until his [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]].<ref name="SW:ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref> The shuttle escaped to Grievous's [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyer]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']].<ref name="LoE">''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Tri-wing shuttle first appeared in the novel ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', written by [[James Luceno]]. In the novel, the craft Grievous used to transport Palpatine to ''Invisible Hand'' was referred to both as a tri-wing shuttle and tri-winged shuttle. However, in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', the craft used by Grievous shows only two (albeit ''tri''angular) wings, with the rear possibly accounting for a third "wing."
